title: 100ml EB buffer (PH=8)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a8i56","text":"This is the recipe for how to make 100ml EB buffer (PH=8)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare 80 mL UltraPure Distilled Water Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #10977-015 in a suitable container.
Add 0.12114 g of Tris Base Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP152-1 to the solution.
Adjust solution to desired (pH 8.0) using HCl (typically pH ≈ 7.0).
Add UltraPure Distilled Water Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #10977-015 until the volume reaches to 100ml.
creator: Menglin WANG
